description_long: This is a tall, narrow shelving unit with a rectangular footprint and a modern, minimalist design. The structure features five open shelves, each with angled side supports, providing ample vertical storage space. The exterior surfaces are finished in a light wood grain, while the interior shelving and trim are a contrasting darker wood tone. The top of the unit is flat and slightly overhangs the sides, adding a subtle decorative touch. The sides are solid panels, and there are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels. This piece is suitable for use in urban environments such as entryways, garages, or public spaces for organizing or displaying items.
description: A tall, narrow shelving unit with five open shelves, finished in light and dark wood tones. It features solid side panels and a flat overhanging top.
description_view_0: The side view shows a solid light wood panel with no visible shelves or openings.
description_view_1: This angled view reveals the open shelving structure with five shelves and dark wood interior, as well as the overhanging top.
description_view_2: The front view displays all five open shelves, the dark wood interior, and the full height of the unit.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors view 0, showing a solid light wood panel with no visible shelves.
